description: A public health research team is conducting a bilingual community vaccine hesitancy study targeting both English- and Spanish-speaking populations. Log in at http://localhost/index.php/admin with admin/Admin123!. For the 'Vaccine Acceptance and Hesitancy Study' survey, implement full Spanish (es) language support. This includes providing Spanish translations for the survey title, description, and all 8 questions across the 'Vaccination Experience' and 'Attitudes and Beliefs' groups, as well as all multiple-choice answer options. Ensure the Spanish language version is properly configured and accessible as an alternate option for respondents.

metadata.occupation_context: Survey Researchers / Social Science Research Assistants
metadata.instrument_source: WHO SAGE Working Group on Vaccine Hesitancy determinants framework
